name: materials-skills
description: Full-cycle civil engineering and construction-materials research skills for literature, writing, figures, data, PPTX, citations, and reviewer responses.

interface.longDescription: Use Materials Science Skills to run routed materials paper-production workflows across research planning, citation screening, reader packages, manuscript drafting, English polishing, figure packages, FAIR data organization, reviewer simulation, reviewer responses, and PPTX generation.
defaultPrompt: Help me run a WER-EA mini-review workflow from screening to figure planning.
Audit this experimental manuscript for evidence gaps before I draft the discussion.
Turn this paper package into a journal-club slide outline and then a real PPTX.
